$schema_notes: Schema for ai-presentation-builder. Top-level blocks: deck, theme, title_slide, slides[]. density was removed as a filter input; density tags remain on each pattern (metadata) but no longer narrow the picker. Slide volume + audience + archetype inform Claude's per-slide recommendation instead. This is a fictional example.

deck.name: Northwind-Activation-Review
deck._density_advisory: Optional. Soft signal for Claude's per-slide recommendation. Accepts: sparse | light | medium | heavy. Does NOT filter the pattern picker. Omit if no preference.

title_slide.thesis_bold: We don't have an acquisition problem. We have a retention problem.
title_slide.thesis_italics: Stabilise Day-1 first; the funnel compounds from there.
title_slide.submission_line: Submitted to: CEO + Board | 15 min + 10 min Q&A

slides.title: Where we are vs where we said we'd be
slides.context: Four numbers tell the whole story.

slides.title: Three behaviours predict 8x conversion
slides.context: We isolated the signal in a 192-day cohort.
